description_long: This is an adult male figure with a fit build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is wearing short, fitted swim trunks and no shirt, revealing a well-defined torso and limbs. His facial features are clean-shaven, and his hair is short and neatly styled. The skin tone is natural, and the body proportions are realistic, with visible muscle definition. The feet are bare, and there are no visible accessories or carried objects. The overall appearance suggests a casual, athletic individual, possibly prepared for swimming or a similar activity.
description: Athletic adult male standing in a T-pose, wearing short swim trunks and barefoot, with short hair and no accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, chest, and extended arms, with swim trunks and bare feet clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, chest, and the arm extended forward, with the leg and foot in profile.
description_view_2: Back view displays the back, shoulders, and arms outstretched, with the swim trunks and legs from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, chest, and extended arm, with the leg and foot in profile.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
